entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: The country where the study on farmer preferences for groundnut varieties was conducted

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop whose variety traits were analyzed based on farmer preferences

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: A desirable characteristic of groundnut varieties that farmers strongly prefer and are willing to pay a premium for

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut varieties to withstand environmental stresses, highly valued by farmers

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of groundnut varieties to mature quickly, preferred by farmers

entities.name: RED COLOR
entities.description: The specific seed color of groundnut varieties preferred by farmers

entities.name: HIGH SALE PRICE
entities.description: The attribute of groundnut varieties that allows them to fetch higher prices in grain markets

entities.name: CHOICE EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A research method used to collect data on farmer preferences and trade-offs for variety attributes

entities.name: LATENT CLASS ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to identify distinct classes of farmers based on their preference heterogeneity

entities.name: DEMAND-DRIVEN VARIETAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The approach of breeding crop varieties based on the preferences and needs of the end-users/farmers

entities.name: FARMER PREFERENCES
entities.description: The subjective likes and dislikes of farmers regarding specific crop variety traits

entities.name: WILLINGNESS TO PAY
entities.description: The maximum amount farmers are prepared to pay for specific improved traits in crop varieties
